title: Mexican Standoff
summary:
Main
Image reference: Products-Tanker.jpg | assets/2024-12-03_mexican-standoff_img_products-tanker_432c58f603f3.jpg
President-elect Donald Trump has announced that he will implement a 25% tariff on all products entering the US from Canada and Mexico. Sources indicate that oil will not be exempted from the tariffs, and as such oil flows could be significantly impacted. Canada exports over 4 mbd to the US, the vast majority of which is heavy crude transported on pipelines and difficult to redirect.
